rationale: The cited paper appears in the citing article only as part of a grouped literature citation in the background section on prior social-network research. The text does not single it out for a specific claim, mechanism, variable, or empirical benchmark, and it is not used in the model development, estimation, or validation sections. The citing paper's core contribution (joint modeling of sentiment and venue format choice for social media listening) does not build directly on the cited paper's diffusion-model framework in any explicit way.
